failed_gate: Factorio 0.14 exact-candidate retention fresh reload proof grammar
harness_error: Factorio fresh-reload exited without benchmarked loaded-map proof
root_cause: Factorio 0.14 completes a one-tick benchmarked load without emitting the Goodbye marker used by newer target lines.
fix: For Factorio 0.13 and 0.14, accept exact MIR load, Loading map, Map version, and process exit code 0 without requiring Goodbye.
regression: Test-MIRPowerShellQuality requires the shared harness to carry an explicit requiresGoodbye capability boundary.
candidate_implication: The 1.4.0 and 1.3.0 candidates require corrected retention reruns and fresh seals; no published version is affected.
